all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
Yet a man is risen to pursue thee, and to seek thy soul: but the soul of my lord shall be bound in the bundle of life with the Lord thy God; and the souls of thine enemies, them shall he sling out, as out of the middle of a sling.
1 Samuel 25:29
Quote of the Day
"[Jesus Christ’s] Resurrection and His Atonement are the most powerful, far-reaching, and sacred events in all human history."
Elder Ronald A. Rasband | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
